title: psacalium hintoniorum
intro: Psacalium hintoniorum, also known as Hinton's Psacalium, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psacalium hintoniorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
